title: 11 Viewing Transactions, Images, and Shipments
body_text:
11	Viewing Transactions, Images, and Shipments
11.1	Viewing TodayГўВҖВҷs Purchases and Sales
To view, buy, and sell transactions on FX Notes, a standard user proceeds as follows:
Log in to FX Notes as described in Section 6.2, Logging in to FX Notes.
Select
Transactional
, then
Orders
on the left-hand menu. See Figure 1.
Figure 1: Navigate to Orders
View the Orders page, then use the drop-down menus to filter through the transactions by type (e.g., Buy from Client or Sell to Client), status, and date. See Figure 2.
Figure 2: View and Filter Orders
The following statuses can be used to filter through your list of transactions:
Draft
ГўВҖВ“ The item is being created or edited but not yet submitted for approval.
Pending Compliance Approval
ГўВҖВ“ Waiting for compliance team review and approval.
Pending Operational Approval
ГўВҖВ“ Awaiting operational teamГўВҖВҷs authorization.
Pending Financial Approval
ГўВҖВ“ Requires financial teamГўВҖВҷs approval before proceeding.
Pending Reception
ГўВҖВ“ Waiting to be received by the designated recipient or location.
Pending Vault Processing
ГўВҖВ“ Awaiting secure vault handling or verification.
Ready to Prepare
ГўВҖВ“ Approved and ready for preparation or processing.
Ready to Ship
ГўВҖВ“ Fully processed and cleared for shipment.
Delayed
ГўВҖВ“ Processing or shipment is postponed due to an issue or dependency.
Completed
ГўВҖВ“ All steps finished successfully; process closed.
Voided
ГўВҖВ“ Invalidated; the item will not proceed further.
Cancelled
ГўВҖВ“ Process stopped intentionally before completion.
Adjusted
ГўВҖВ“ Modified after initial submission or approval.
11.2	Viewing Shipments and Shipment Labels
To view a list of recent shipments:
Log in to FX Notes as described in Section 6.2, Logging in to FX Notes.
Select
Transactional
, then
Shipments
on the left-hand menu. See Figure 3.
Figure 3: Navigate to Shipments
View the Shipments Management page, then filter the shipments by tracking/waybill or carrier. Once your filters are provided, select
Apply Filters
. See Figure 4.
Figure 4: Shipments Management Page
To view or reprint a shipping label, locate the transaction (e.g., generate a Periodic Transactions Report or select
TodayГўВҖВҷs Purchases
). Then, select the transactionГўВҖВҷs Reference Number. The Buying Operation and Client Receipt generates, and you can reprint the shipping label using your browserГўВҖВҷs print function.
11.3	Viewing a List of Available Foreign Currencies and Their Images
All FX Notes users can view images of foreign currency supplied by Globex 2000. To view available foreign currencies and their images:
Log in to FX Notes as described in Section 6.2, Logging in to FX Notes.
Select
Transactional
, then
Denomination
on the left-hand menu. The list of available currencies is displayed. See Figure 5.
Figure 5: Navigate to Denominations
Select a currency on the Denominations page. See image above.
View the list of available denominations, then select a denomination if you want to view images. See Figure 6.
Figure 6: View Denominations
Select a thumbnail image of the note you want to view. See Figure 7
Figure 7: Select Image
View images of the selected note.
Note:	Additional information on authenticating currency notes is available in Chapter 10, Buying Foreign Currency from a Customer.
END
